{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''Vader'' hunted me, and my ship was destroyed… my ''ruined body'' encased in a pressure suit, I floated in empty space… until I was rescued by the ''Ganathans!''<nowiki></nowiki>|[[Empatojayos Brand]]|<ref name="DEII4" />}}
The '''Ganathans''', or '''Ganathians''',<ref name="DEII5">[[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]]</ref><ref name="SWE">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Near-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]] indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ganath/Legends|Ganath]], located within a largely uncharted cloud of gases within [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] known as the [[Oktos Nebula/Legends|Oktos Nebula]]. Cut off from the outside by the uncharted and unexplored expanses of highly [[Radiation/Legends|irradiated]] interstellar gases that surrounded their pocket of [[Realspace/Legends|space]], Ganathan technology remained at an archaic level in comparison to much of the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. They had limited space-travel capabilities, making use of [[Water/Legends|steam]]-powered [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]] capable of slow, inter-[[Star system/Legends|system]] journeys.

Despite their antiquated technologies in some areas, the Ganathans were quite advanced in other fields. For instance, the Ganathans helped craft the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Empatojayos Brand]]'s [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] suit and the [[Lightning gun (Ganath)|lightning gun]] weapons system. With his ship too damaged to travel, the severely wounded [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] had remained among the Ganathans, who combined their technology with his own to create the [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] sphere that housed Brand's body and kept him alive. Eventually Brand came to be the Ganathans' leader, and ruled their [[Ganathan Empire|civilization]] through the Jedi creed of justice.

In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], the severely damaged [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] flew into [[Ganathan Space]], and the Humans [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], and [[Vima-Da-Boda]], and the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] sought sanctuary among the Ganathans and their [[King/Legends|king]].
